assumptions: The question concerns hedge accounting under IFRS 9 in consolidated financial statements.
The intragroup dividend position gives rise to a foreign-currency exposure within the group.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context identifies fair value hedge as a hedge model for a recognised asset or liability and separately addresses foreign currency risk of an intragroup monetary item in consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context identifies cash flow hedge as a hedge model for foreign-currency-related cash flow variability and specifically includes highly probable forecast intragroup transactions in consolidation.
